summary: iter55.14 SEO hygiene verification — tested robots.txt, sitemap.xml, canonical + og/twitter/robots meta on the preview URL. All 9 review checklist items PASS. SPA still renders normally with no regressions.

seo_checklist_results.robots_txt_directives: PASS — contains 'Disallow: /dashboard', 'Disallow: /admin', 'Disallow: /api/', and 'Sitemap: https://p2p.resiliencebrothers.com/sitemap.xml' (Cloudflare AI-blocklist is prepended above our directives as expected)
seo_checklist_results.sitemap_xml_valid_and_single_url: PASS — XML parses without error via ElementTree, exactly 1 <url> entry with <loc>https://p2p.resiliencebrothers.com/</loc>
seo_checklist_results.canonical_link: PASS — <link rel="canonical" href="https://p2p.resiliencebrothers.com/" /> present in static HTML and live DOM
seo_checklist_results.twitter_cards: PASS — twitter:card=summary_large_image, twitter:title, twitter:description, twitter:image all present
seo_checklist_results.regression_title_favicon_manifest_viewpo: PASS — <title>Resilience Brothers · P2P Trade</title>, icon-192.png/favicon-64.png, /manifest.webmanifest, viewport meta all intact
seo_checklist_results.spa_renders_no_console_errors_from_seo_c: PASS — Landing page renders correctly ('Comercio P2P sin fronteras. Sin fricción.'), #root has children, 0 page errors. 2 pre-existing 401 console errors observed (anonymous auth-session pre-check) — NOT caused by this iteration and unrelated to SEO changes.

critical_code_review_comments: Preview URL sets 'x-robots-tag: noindex, nofollow' HTTP header at the emergentagent.com edge — this is correct for a preview environment (prevents preview indexation) and will NOT be present on the production p2p.resiliencebrothers.com domain, so it does not conflict with the in-HTML index/follow meta.

Cloudflare prepends its own 'BEGIN Cloudflare Managed content' AI-crawler blocklist BEFORE our directives in robots.txt. This is additive (blocks Amazonbot/ClaudeBot/GPTBot/etc.) and does not override our own 'User-agent: *' rules that follow — verified as expected behavior.
Robots.txt uses 'Allow: /$' + 'Disallow: /dashboard' etc. The specific Disallows will correctly override the earlier Cloudflare 'Allow: /' for the private routes. Semantics are correct.
Minor nit: sitemap.xml is missing <lastmod> — not required by the spec, and Google is fine without it, but adding a real ISO date would help with recrawl scheduling. Non-blocking.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth flows tested this iteration
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter55.14 SEO changes fully verified on preview URL https://p2p-exchange-hub-2.preview.emergentagent.com. All 3 GSC issues addressed at the frontend static-asset layer: (1) robots.txt disallows private SPA routes; (2) sitemap.xml declares a single canonical index URL; (3) index.html has <link rel=canonical>, robots/googlebot meta, og:url, twitter cards. Production domain p2p.resiliencebrothers.com still requires a redeploy for these changes to reach real Googlebot. No backend changes were made or tested this iteration.
rca of the issue: N/A — this was a verification-only pass, no bugs found. All items from the review request pass on the preview URL.
